title: rgb2lab
summary: Convert sRGB image or colormap values to CIE L*a*b* with MATLAB-compatible D65 conversion defaults.

gpu_support.notes: Host implementation uses the default sRGB/D65 conversion path.

description: `rgb2lab(RGB)` converts RGB image or colormap values to CIE L*a*b* using default sRGB/D65 assumptions. The conversion follows MATLAB-compatible transfer, white-point, and output-shape behavior for supported input forms.
behaviors: Accepts MxNx3 truecolor images and Nx3 colormaps.
Integer RGB inputs are scaled into [0,1] before conversion.
Name-value options are not implemented in this Tier 1 version.

examples.output: % LAB has L*, a*, and b* channels
